revision.text:
[[ja:伊加加志神社]] {{Expand Japanese|伊加加志神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Ikagashi Shrine | native_name = 伊加加志神社 | image = Ikagashi Shrine, Tokushima.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ikagashi Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.053621|134.301389}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Ikagashikome|lt=Ikagashikome|cs|Ikagašikome|en|Ikagashikome|fa|اکاگاشیکومه|ja|伊香色謎命|th|อิกางาชิโกเมะ|zh|伊香色谜命|qid=Q10885176|1=Ikagashikome}} }} {{nihongo|'''Ikagashi Shrine'''|伊加加志神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * (Tokushima)|ja|阿波国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11657514|1=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)}} ** Series ordinal: 20 ** P155: {{ill|Q135041330|ltq=Q135041330|qid=Q135041330|1=Amamurakumono Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135041333|ltq=Q135041333|qid=Q135041333|1=Amatsunumahikono Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Yoshinogawa, Tokushima|lt=Yoshinogawa|ar|يوشينوغاوا (توكوشيما)|azb|یوشینوقاوا، توکوشیما|ca|Yoshinogawa|ceb|Yoshinogawa Shi|ce|Йосиногава|cs|Jošinogawa (Tokušima)|de|Yoshinogawa|en|Yoshinogawa, Tokushima|es|Yoshinogawa (Tokushima)|fa|یوشینوگاوا، توکوشیما|fi|Yoshinogawa|fr|Yoshinogawa|gl|Yoshinogawa|hy|Յոսինոգավա|id|Yoshinogawa, Tokushima|it|Yoshinogawa|ja|吉野川市|javoyage|吉野川市|ko|요시노가와시|mzn|یوشینوگاوا، توکوشیما|nl|Yoshinogawa|pl|Yoshinogawa|pt|Yoshinogawa|ro|Yoshinogawa|ru|Йосиногава|sv|Yoshinogawa|tg|Ёшиногауа|tl|Yoshinogawa, Tokushima|tr|Yoshinogawa|tt|Йосиногава|uk|Йошіноґава|ur|یوشنوگوا، توکشیما|vi|Yoshinogawa, Tokushima|war|Yoshinogawa, Tokushima|zh_classical|吉野川市|zh_min_nan|Yosinogawa-chhī|zh_yue|吉野川|zh|吉野川市|qid=Q592500|1=Yoshinogawa, Tokushima}} * {{ill|Q907457|ltq=Q907457|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}} * {{ill|Q3205811|ltq=Q3205811|qid=Q3205811|1=Oe District, Tokushima}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.053621|134.301389}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == image (P18) == * Ikagashi Shrine, Tokushima.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q10885176|ltq=Q10885176|qid=Q10885176|1=Ikagashikome}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183194 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917316|ltq=Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == architectural style (P149) == * {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|lt=nagare-zukuri|en|Nagare-zukuri|fr|Nagare-zukuri|it|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|pl|Nagare-zukuri|ru|Нагарэ-дзукури|sv|Nagare-zukuri|zh|流造|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * いかがしじんじゃ == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県吉野川市川島町桑村字大明神1635', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:伊加加志神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11378911}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Ikagashi Shrine |Image = [[File:Ikagashi Shrine, Tokushima.jpg|280px]]
Worship hall |Location = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Yoshinogawa City|Q592500|qid=Q592500|1=Yoshinogawa, Tokushima}} Kawashima-chō Kuwamura, Aza Daimyōjin 1635 |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{ill|lt=Ikagashikenu no Mikoto|Q10885176|qid=Q10885176|lt=Ikagairo Koyome no Mikoto|1=Ikagashikome}}
{{ill|lt=Ikagashio no Mikoto|UNKNOWN|lt=Ikagairo Koyoo no Mikoto}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu|qid=Q455602}} |Shrine rank = {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha (minor shrine)|Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
Former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |Founded = Date of foundation unknown |Main hall style = {{ill|lt=Nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |Alternative name = Hinomi Daimyōjin |Pilgrimage sites = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Ikagashi
Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ikagashi Shrine''' (いかがしじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}, {{ill|lt=Yoshinogawa City|Q592500|qid=Q592500|1=Yoshinogawa, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Kawashima-chō Kuwamura|Q28689393|qid=Q28689393|1=Kawashima-chō Kuwamura}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}. === History === The date of its foundation is unknown. Until the {{ill|lt=Meiji era|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} it was called “Hinomi (Hinomikoto) Daimyōjin.” In the 3rd year of Meiji ({{ill|lt=1870|Q7741|qid=Q7741|1=1870}}) it was renamed to its present name, and in May of the following year it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. The former shrine site was lost due to flooding of the {{ill|lt=Yoshino River (representative topic)|UNKNOWN|lt=Yoshino River}}, but it was later relocated to its current location. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Ikagashikenu no Mikoto|Q10885176|qid=Q10885176|lt=Ikagairo Koyome no Mikoto|1=Ikagashikome}} * {{ill|lt=Ikagashio no Mikoto|UNKNOWN|lt=Ikagairo Koyoo no Mikoto}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu|qid=Q455602}} === Shrine crest === * Yabane (arrow-notch) === Subsidiary shrines === There are Ebisu Shrine ({{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}) and Konpira Shrine ({{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo no Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} and {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kanayamahiko no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}). === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ikagashi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ikagashi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ikagashi Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Yoshinogawa]] [[Category:Buildings in Yoshinogawa]]
